  • Method
net.milkbowl.vault2.permission

Interface PermissionUnlocked


  • public interface PermissionUnlocked
    Represents a permission provider to manage permissions, groups, and related operations within specific contexts and for specific subjects. This class offers methods to query, set, and retrieve permission states, either synchronously or asynchronously, including support for transient permissions and group-related operations. All operations assume that neither the context, subject, nor permission identifier are null. Operations may return default states (such as UNDEFINED) or empty values depending on context, group definitions, and permission configurations.
    Since:
    2.18
    Author:
    creatorfromhell

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean addGroup(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Assigns the specified subject to a given group within the provided context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addGroupAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Adds a group to the specified subject within the provided context.
      boolean copyGroups(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to)
      Copies all groups from the source subject to the target subject.
      CompletableFuture<Boolean> copyGroupsAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to)
      Asynchronously copies groups from one subject to another subject within the given context.
      boolean copyPermissions(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to, boolean includeTransient)
      Copies permissions from one subject to another.
      CompletableFuture<Boolean> copyPermissionsAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to, boolean includeTransient)
      Asynchronously copies permissions from one subject to another.
      @NotNull String[] getGroups(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Retrieves the groups associated with the provided subject in the specified context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<String[]> getGroupsAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Asynchronously retrieves the groups associated with the specified subject within the given context.
      @NotNull String getName()
      Retrieves the name of this permission provider.
      @NotNull TriState groupHas(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission)
      Checks whether the specified group has the given permission within the context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<TriState> groupHasAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission)
      Checks if a specific group has a given permission within a provided context.
      @NotNull String[] groups()
      Retrieves the array of group names associated with this permission provider.
      boolean groupSetPermission(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets the specified permission in a given group within a specified context to a desired state.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> groupSetPermissionAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets a specific permission for a group associated in the provided context.
      boolean groupSetTransientPermission(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets a transient permission for a specific group within a given context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> groupSetTransientPermissionAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull String group, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets a transient permission for a specific group within the given context.
      @NotNull TriState has(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission)
      Retrieves the permission state for a given context, subject, and permission identifier.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<TriState> hasAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission)
      Asynchronously retrieves the permission state for a given context, subject, and permission identifier.
      boolean hasGroupSupport()
      Checks whether the permission provider supports group-based permissions.
      boolean hasSuperPermsSupport()
      Checks whether the permission provider supports SuperPerms.
      boolean inGroup(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Determines whether the specified subject is in a group within the given context.
      boolean inGroup(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Determines whether the specified subject belongs to the given group within the provided context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> inGroupAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Asynchronously checks if the specified subject is part of a group in the given context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> inGroupAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Asynchronously checks if the given subject is part of the specified group within the provided context.
      boolean isEnabled()
      Checks whether this permission provider is enabled.
      String primaryGroup(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Retrieves the primary group associated with the specified subject in the given context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<String> primaryGroupAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject)
      Asynchronously retrieves the primary group associated with the specified subject in the given context.
      boolean removeGroup(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Removes the specified subject from the given group within the provided context.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeGroupAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String group)
      Removes the specified group from the given subject within the provided context.
      boolean setPermission(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets the specified permission for a subject within a given context to a specified state.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setPermissionAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Asynchronously sets the specified permission to a given tri-state value for a subject within a context.
      boolean setTransientPermission(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Sets a transient permission for a specific subject within a given context to a specified value.
      @NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setTransientPermissionAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject subject, @NotNull String permission, @NotNull TriState value)
      Asynchronously sets a transient permission for the specified subject in the given context.

    • Method Detail

      • isEnabled

        boolean isEnabled()
        Checks whether this permission provider is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if the permission provider is enabled; false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • getName

        @NotNull
@NotNull String getName()
        Retrieves the name of this permission provider.
        Returns:
        the name of the permission provider as a non-null string.
        Since:
        2.18

      • hasGroupSupport

        boolean hasGroupSupport()
        Checks whether the permission provider supports group-based permissions.
        Returns:
        true if group-based permissions are supported; false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • hasSuperPermsSupport

        boolean hasSuperPermsSupport()
        Checks whether the permission provider supports SuperPerms.
        Returns:
        true if SuperPerms are supported; false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyPermissions

        boolean copyPermissions(@NotNull
                        @NotNull Context context,
                        @NotNull
                        @NotNull Subject from,
                        @NotNull
                        @NotNull Subject to,
                        boolean includeTransient)
        Copies permissions from one subject to another.
        Parameters:
        context - the operational context in which the permissions are being copied; must not be null
        from - the source subject from which permissions are copied; must not be null
        to - the target subject to which permissions are copied; must not be null
        includeTransient - if true, includes transient permissions in the copy; otherwise, only durable permissions are copied
        Returns:
        true if the permissions were successfully copied, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyPermissionsAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> copyPermissionsAsync(@NotNull
                                                @NotNull Context context,
                                                @NotNull
                                                @NotNull Subject from,
                                                @NotNull
                                                @NotNull Subject to,
                                                boolean includeTransient)
        Asynchronously copies permissions from one subject to another.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed; cannot be null
        from - the source subject from which permissions will be copied; cannot be null
        to - the target subject to which permissions will be copied; cannot be null
        includeTransient - a flag indicating whether transient permissions should also be copied
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the permissions were successfully copied, or false if the operation failed
        Since:
        2.18

      • has

        @NotNull
@NotNull TriState has(@NotNull
                               @NotNull Context context,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull Subject subject,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull String permission)
        Retrieves the permission state for a given context, subject, and permission identifier.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is being checked cannot be null
        subject - the subject for whom the permission is being checked cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to check cannot be null
        Returns:
        a TriState value indicating the permission state, which can be TRUE, FALSE, or UNDEFINED
        Since:
        2.18

      • hasAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<TriState> hasAsync(@NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Context context,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                       @NotNull
                                                       @NotNull String permission)
        Asynchronously retrieves the permission state for a given context, subject, and permission identifier.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is being checked; cannot be null
        subject - the subject for whom the permission is being checked; cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to check; cannot be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with a TriState value indicating the permission state, which can be TRUE, FALSE, or UNDEFINED
        Since:
        2.18

      • setPermission

        boolean setPermission(@NotNull
                      @NotNull Context context,
                      @NotNull
                      @NotNull Subject subject,
                      @NotNull
                      @NotNull String permission,
                      @NotNull
                      @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets the specified permission for a subject within a given context to a specified state.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is being set; cannot be null
        subject - the subject for whom the permission is being set; cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to modify; cannot be null
        value - the TriState value indicating the desired state of the permission; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the permission was successfully set, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setPermissionAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setPermissionAsync(@NotNull
                                                                @NotNull Context context,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull String permission,
                                                                @NotNull
                                                                @NotNull TriState value)
        Asynchronously sets the specified permission to a given tri-state value for a subject within a context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context within which the permission should be set, not null
        subject - the subject for whom the permission is being set, not null
        permission - the specific permission to set, not null
        value - the tri-state value to set for the permission, not null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with `true` if the permission was successfully set, or `false` if the operation failed
        Since:
        2.18

      • setTransientPermission

        boolean setTransientPermission(@NotNull
                               @NotNull Context context,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull Subject subject,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull String permission,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets a transient permission for a specific subject within a given context to a specified value. Transient permissions are temporary and do not persist beyond the current runtime.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is being set; cannot be null
        subject - the subject for whom the transient permission is being set; cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to modify; cannot be null
        value - the TriState value indicating the desired state of the permission; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the transient permission was successfully set, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setTransientPermissionAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> setTransientPermissionAsync(@NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull Context context,
                                                                         @NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                                         @NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull String permission,
                                                                         @NotNull
                                                                         @NotNull TriState value)
        Asynchronously sets a transient permission for the specified subject in the given context. A transient permission is not persisted and will only last for the duration of the program's runtime.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is to be set, must not be null
        subject - the subject to which the permission is to be assigned, must not be null
        permission - the permission string to be set, must not be null
        value - the state of the permission (true, false, or undefined), must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with a boolean indicating whether the permission change was successful
        Since:
        2.18

      • groups

        @NotNull
@NotNull String[] groups()
        Retrieves the array of group names associated with this permission provider.
        Returns:
        an array of group names as non-null strings. The array may be empty if no groups are defined.
        Since:
        2.18

      • primaryGroup

        String primaryGroup(@NotNull
                    @NotNull Context context,
                    @NotNull
                    @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the primary group associated with the specified subject in the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the primary group is being queried; cannot be null
        subject - the subject whose primary group is being retrieved; cannot be null
        Returns:
        the name of the primary group associated with the subject within the specified context, or null if no primary group is defined
        Since:
        2.18

      • primaryGroupAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<String> primaryGroupAsync(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull Context context,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull Subject subject)
        Asynchronously retrieves the primary group associated with the specified subject in the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the primary group is being queried; cannot be null
        subject - the subject whose primary group is being retrieved; cannot be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with the name of the primary group associated with the subject within the specified context, or completes with null if no primary group is defined
        Since:
        2.18

      • getGroups

        @NotNull
@NotNull String[] getGroups(@NotNull
                                     @NotNull Context context,
                                     @NotNull
                                     @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the groups associated with the provided subject in the specified context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the subject's group memberships are being retrieved; cannot be null
        subject - the subject whose group memberships are being retrieved; cannot be null
        Returns:
        an array of group names associated with the subject within the specified context; may be empty if no groups are associated
        Since:
        2.18

      • getGroupsAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<String[]> getGroupsAsync(@NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Context context,
                                                             @NotNull
                                                             @NotNull Subject subject)
        Asynchronously retrieves the groups associated with the specified subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the subject's group memberships are being retrieved; cannot be null
        subject - the subject whose group memberships are being retrieved; cannot be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with an array of group names associated with the subject within the specified context; the array may be empty if no groups are associated
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyGroups

        boolean copyGroups(@NotNull
                   @NotNull Context context,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject from,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject to)
        Copies all groups from the source subject to the target subject.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed, must not be null
        from - the source subject from which the groups will be copied, must not be null
        to - the target subject to which the groups will be copied, must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the groups were successfully copied, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyGroupsAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> copyGroupsAsync(@NotNull
                                           @NotNull Context context,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject from,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject to)
        Asynchronously copies groups from one subject to another subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the groups will be copied; must not be null
        from - the source subject from which groups will be copied; must not be null
        to - the target subject to which groups will be copied; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with true if the groups are copied successfully, or false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • inGroup

        boolean inGroup(@NotNull
                @NotNull Context context,
                @NotNull
                @NotNull Subject subject)
        Determines whether the specified subject is in a group within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group membership is being checked; cannot be null
        subject - the subject for whom the group membership is being checked; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the subject is a member of a group within the specified context; false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • inGroup

        boolean inGroup(@NotNull
                @NotNull Context context,
                @NotNull
                @NotNull Subject subject,
                @NotNull
                @NotNull String group)
        Determines whether the specified subject belongs to the given group within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group membership is being checked, must not be null
        subject - the subject whose membership is being verified, must not be null
        group - the name of the group to check for membership, must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the subject belongs to the specified group in the given context, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • inGroupAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> inGroupAsync(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Context context,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Subject subject)
        Asynchronously checks if the specified subject is part of a group in the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group check is performed; must not be null.
        subject - the subject to check for group membership; must not be null.
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will be completed with true if the subject is in the group, false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • inGroupAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> inGroupAsync(@NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Context context,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                          @NotNull
                                                          @NotNull String group)
        Asynchronously checks if the given subject is part of the specified group within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group membership should be checked, must not be null
        subject - the subject whose group membership is to be verified, must not be null
        group - the name of the group to check membership against, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that will complete with a Boolean indicating whether the subject is in the group
        Since:
        2.18

      • addGroup

        boolean addGroup(@NotNull
                 @NotNull Context context,
                 @NotNull
                 @NotNull Subject subject,
                 @NotNull
                 @NotNull String group)
        Assigns the specified subject to a given group within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group assignment is being performed; cannot be null
        subject - the subject to be assigned to the group; cannot be null
        group - the name of the group the subject should be assigned to; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the group was successfully set for the subject, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • addGroupAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> addGroupAsync(@NotNull
                                                           @NotNull Context context,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                           @NotNull
                                                           @NotNull String group)
        Adds a group to the specified subject within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the operational context in which the group addition should occur, must not be null
        subject - the subject to whom the group will be added, must not be null
        group - the name of the group to be added, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to true if the group was successfully added, or false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • removeGroup

        boolean removeGroup(@NotNull
                    @NotNull Context context,
                    @NotNull
                    @NotNull Subject subject,
                    @NotNull
                    @NotNull String group)
        Removes the specified subject from the given group within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is being performed; cannot be null
        subject - the subject to be removed from the group; cannot be null
        group - the name of the group the subject should be removed from; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the subject was successfully removed from the group, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • removeGroupAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeGroupAsync(@NotNull
                                                              @NotNull Context context,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull Subject subject,
                                                              @NotNull
                                                              @NotNull String group)
        Removes the specified group from the given subject within the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group is to be removed, must not be null
        subject - the subject from which the group is to be removed, must not be null
        group - the name of the group to remove, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the group was successfully removed
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupHas

        @NotNull
@NotNull TriState groupHas(@NotNull
                                    @NotNull Context context,
                                    @NotNull
                                    @NotNull String group,
                                    @NotNull
                                    @NotNull String permission)
        Checks whether the specified group has the given permission within the context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group permission is being checked; cannot be null
        group - the name of the group whose permission is being checked; cannot be null
        permission - the specific permission identifier to be checked; cannot be null
        Returns:
        a TriState value indicating the state of the permission for the group, which can be TRUE, FALSE, or UNDEFINED
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupHasAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<TriState> groupHasAsync(@NotNull
                                                            @NotNull Context context,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String group,
                                                            @NotNull
                                                            @NotNull String permission)
        Checks if a specific group has a given permission within a provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the check is performed; must not be null
        group - the name of the group being checked; must not be null
        permission - the permission being checked for the group; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a TriState, indicating whether the group has the specified permission (TRUE, FALSE, or UNDEFINED); never null
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupSetPermission

        boolean groupSetPermission(@NotNull
                           @NotNull Context context,
                           @NotNull
                           @NotNull String group,
                           @NotNull
                           @NotNull String permission,
                           @NotNull
                           @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets the specified permission in a given group within a specified context to a desired state.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group permission is being set; cannot be null
        group - the name of the group for which the permission is assigned; cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to modify; cannot be null
        value - the TriState value indicating the desired state of the permission; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the permission was successfully set for the group, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupSetPermissionAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> groupSetPermissionAsync(@NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull Context context,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String group,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull String permission,
                                                                     @NotNull
                                                                     @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets a specific permission for a group associated in the provided context. The permission's state can be set to true, false, or undefined using the TriState value.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the group and subject operate, must not be null
        group - the name of the group for which the permission is being set, must not be null
        permission - the permission string to be set for the group, must not be null
        value - the TriState value representing the desired state of the permission (true, false, or undefined), must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with a Boolean indicating whether the operation was successful
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupSetTransientPermission

        boolean groupSetTransientPermission(@NotNull
                                    @NotNull Context context,
                                    @NotNull
                                    @NotNull String group,
                                    @NotNull
                                    @NotNull String permission,
                                    @NotNull
                                    @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets a transient permission for a specific group within a given context. Transient permissions are temporary and do not persist beyond the current runtime.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission is being set; cannot be null
        group - the name of the group for which the transient permission is assigned; cannot be null
        permission - the identifier of the permission to modify; cannot be null
        value - the TriState value indicating the desired state of the permission; cannot be null
        Returns:
        true if the transient permission was successfully set for the group, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • groupSetTransientPermissionAsync

        @NotNull
@NotNull CompletableFuture<Boolean> groupSetTransientPermissionAsync(@NotNull
                                                                              @NotNull Context context,
                                                                              @NotNull
                                                                              @NotNull String group,
                                                                              @NotNull
                                                                              @NotNull String permission,
                                                                              @NotNull
                                                                              @NotNull TriState value)
        Sets a transient permission for a specific group within the given context. The permission will only exist for the duration of the running session and is not persisted.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the permission should be applied, must not be null
        group - the name of the group the permission applies to, must not be null
        permission - the specific permission to be set, must not be null
        value - the value of the permission, represented by TriState, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with a Boolean indicating if the operation was successful
        Since:
        2.18
